provider_readback.page_title: Application summary - Aureon Evidence OS for Cross-Border R&D Assurance - Innovation Funding Service
provider_readback.live_readback_method: Chrome live IFS review page readback; no portal field was changed.

complete_sections: (UK applicants only) Permits and licences (not scored)

decision.why_not_100_percent: The live IFS review page exposes the final submit form but disables the Submit application button because the application has incomplete finance, Project Impact and award-terms sections.

controls: Runtime IFS credential was used only in memory for authenticated readback.
No plaintext password or secret was printed or written.
No IFS portal field was changed by this readback.
No disabled submit control was bypassed.
No final submission, upload, partner invite, email send, Project Impact submission or award-terms acceptance was performed.
